assassination.description: A deadly master of poisons who dispatches victims with vicious dagger strikes. Preferred Weapons: Daggers

left.name: Fatebound
left.description: The Fatebound eagerly act as the Hand of Fate, sowing chaos into well-laid plans. Guided by the whims of a flipped Fatebound Coin, they deliver the ending their enemies are destined for; the ending they deserve.

right.name: Deathstalker
right.description: The harbingers of death, Deathstalkers strike from the shadows to bring a swift end to their targets.

nodes.name: Shiv
nodes.description:
Attack with your off-hand, dealing 2 Physical damage, dispelling all enrage effects and applying a concentrated form of your active Non-Lethal poison.

Awards 1 combo point.

nodes.name: Blind
nodes.description: Blinds the target, causing it to wander disoriented for 1 min. Damage may interrupt the effect. Limit 1.

nodes.name: Cloak of Shadows
nodes.description: Provides a moment of magic immunity, instantly removing all harmful spell effects. The cloak lingers, causing you to resist harmful spells for 5 sec.

nodes.name: Toxic Stiletto
nodes.description: Shiv's Energy cost is reduced by 20, its cooldown is reduced by 15 sec, and its range is increased by 3 yds.

nodes.name: Fleet Footed
nodes.description: Movement speed increased by 15%.

choices.name: Gouge
choices.description:
Gouges the eyes of an enemy target, incapacitating for 4 sec. Damage may interrupt the effect.

Must be in front of your target.

Awards 1 combo point.

choices.name: Airborne Irritant
choices.description: Blind has 50% reduced cooldown, 70% reduced duration, and applies to all nearby enemies.

nodes.name: Thrill Seeking
nodes.description: Shadowstep has 1 additional charge.

nodes.name: Shadowrunner
nodes.description: While Stealth or Shadow Dance is active, you move 20% faster.

nodes.name: Master Poisoner
nodes.description: Increases the non-damaging effects of your weapon poisons by 20%.

choices.name: Elusiveness
choices.description: Evasion also reduces damage taken by 20%, and Feint also reduces non-area-of-effect damage taken by 20%.

choices.name: Cheat Death
choices.description: Fatal attacks instead reduce you to 7% of your maximum health. For 3 sec afterward, you take 85% reduced damage. Cannot trigger more often than once per 6 min.

choices.name: Tricks of the Trade
choices.description: Redirects all threat you cause to the targeted party or raid member, beginning with your next damaging attack within the next 30 sec and lasting 6 sec.

choices.name: Blackjack
choices.description: Enemies have 30% reduced damage and healing for 6 sec after Blind or Sap's effect on them ends.

nodes.name: Improved Wound Poison
nodes.description: Wound Poison can now stack 2 additional times.

nodes.name: Nimble Fingers
nodes.description: Energy cost of Feint and Crimson Vial reduced by 10.

nodes.name: Deadened Nerves
nodes.description: Physical damage taken reduced by 5%.

nodes.name: Quick Fingers
nodes.description: Increases your Agility by 3%.

nodes.name: Improved Sprint
nodes.description: Reduces the cooldown of Sprint by 60 sec.

nodes.name: Superior Mixture
nodes.description: Crippling Poison reduces movement speed by an additional 10%.

nodes.name: Evasion
nodes.description: Increases your dodge chance by 100% for 10 sec.

nodes.name: Iron Stomach
nodes.description: Increases the healing you receive from Crimson Vial, healing potions, and healthstones by 25%.

nodes.name: Virulent Poisons
nodes.description: Increases the damage of your weapon poisons by 10%.

nodes.name: Stillshroud
nodes.description: Shroud of Concealment has 50% reduced cooldown.

nodes.name: Graceful Guile
nodes.description: Feint has 1 additional charge.

nodes.name: Featherfoot
nodes.description: Sprint increases movement speed by an additional 30% and has 4 sec increased duration.

choices.name: Numbing Poison
choices.description: Coats your weapons with a Non-Lethal Poison that lasts for 1 hour. Each strike has a 30% chance of poisoning the enemy, clouding their mind and slowing their attack and casting speed by 15% for 10 sec.

choices.name: Atrophic Poison
choices.description: Coats your weapons with a Non-Lethal Poison that lasts for 1 hour. Each strike has a 30% chance of poisoning the enemy, reducing their damage by 3.0% for 10 sec.

nodes.name: Deadly Precision
nodes.description: Increases the critical strike chance of your attacks that generate combo points by 5%.

nodes.name: Sanguine Vial
nodes.description: When you deal the killing blow to a target that yields experience or honor, the cooldown of Crimson Vial is reduced by 15 sec and your next use heals 5% of your health instantly.

nodes.name: Deep Cuts
nodes.description: Your finishing moves deal 6% increased damage.

nodes.name: Unbreakable Stride
nodes.description: Reduces the duration of movement slowing effects 30%.

nodes.name: Danger Sense
nodes.description: You have a 20% chance to partially evade any damage dealt to you, reducing the damage it deals by 20%.

nodes.name: Swift Slasher
nodes.description: Slice and Dice grants additional attack speed equal to 100% of your Haste.

choices.name: Improved Ambush
choices.description: Ambush generates 1 additional combo point.

choices.name: Tight Spender
choices.description: Energy cost of finishing moves reduced by 6%.

nodes.name: Leeching Poison
nodes.description: Adds a Leeching effect to your Lethal poisons, granting you 3.0% Leech.

nodes.name: Lethality
nodes.description: Critical strike chance increased by 1%. Critical strike damage bonus of your attacks that generate combo points increased by 10%.

nodes.name: Recuperator
nodes.description: Slice and Dice heals you for up to 1% of your maximum health per 3 sec.

nodes.name: Alacrity
nodes.description: Haste increased by 1.5%.

nodes.name: Soothing Darkness
nodes.description: You are healed for 30% of your maximum health over 6 sec after activating Vanish.

nodes.name: Vigor
nodes.description: Increases your maximum Energy by 50 and Energy regeneration by 5%.

nodes.name: Supercharger
nodes.description:
Kingsbane supercharges 1 combo point.

Damaging finishing moves consume a supercharged combo point to function as if they spent 2 additional combo points.

nodes.name: Subterfuge
nodes.description:
Abilities requiring Stealth can be used for 3 sec after Stealth breaks.

Combat benefits requiring Stealth persist for an additional 3 sec after Stealth breaks.

nodes.name: Thistle Tea
nodes.description:
Restore 100 Energy.

When your Energy is reduced below 30, drink a Thistle Tea.

nodes.name: Cold Blooded Killer
nodes.description: Critically striking with an attack that generates combo points increases the critical strike chance of your next finishing move by 10%.

choices.name: Echoing Reprimand
choices.description: After consuming a supercharged combo point, your next Mutilate also strikes the target with an Echoing Reprimand dealing 42 Physical damage.

choices.name: Forced Induction
choices.description: Increase the bonus granted when a damaging finishing move consumes a supercharged combo point by 1.

nodes.name: Deeper Stratagem
nodes.description:
Gain 1 additional max combo point.

Your finishing moves that consume more than 5 combo points have increased effects, and your finishing moves deal 5% increased damage.

nodes.name: Without a Trace
nodes.description: Vanish has 1 additional charge.

nodes.name: Deadly Poison
nodes.description: Coats your weapons with a Lethal Poison that lasts for 1 hour. Each strike has a 30% chance to poison the enemy for 27 Nature damage over 12 sec. Subsequent poison applications will instantly deal 2 Nature damage.

nodes.name: Motivated Murderer
nodes.description: Increases your Energy regeneration by 20%.

nodes.name: Improved Poisons
nodes.description: Increases the application chance of your weapon poisons by 5%.

nodes.name: Path of Blood
nodes.description: Increases maximum Energy by 50.

nodes.name: Crimson Tempest
nodes.description:
Slash all enemies within 10 yds dealing 39 damage. Deals reduced damage beyond 5 targets.

Copy the longest Garrote and Rupture on the enemies you hit onto up to 2 other enemies. 

Awards 1 combo point.

choices.name: Canny Strikes
choices.description: Increases Critical Strike chance by 2%.

choices.name: Internal Bleeding
choices.description: Kidney Shot and Rupture also apply Internal Bleeding, dealing up to 77 Bleed damage over 6 sec, based on combo points spent.

nodes.name: Improved Garrote
nodes.description: Garrote deals 50% increased damage and has no cooldown when used from Stealth and for 6 sec after breaking Stealth.

nodes.name: Thrown Precision
nodes.description: Fan of Knives has 5% increased critical strike chance and its critical strikes always apply your weapon poisons.

nodes.name: Seal Fate
nodes.description: Critical strikes with attacks that generate combo points grant an additional combo point per critical strike.

nodes.name: Doomblade
nodes.description: Mutilate deals an additional 25% Bleed damage over 8 sec.

nodes.name: Razor Wire
nodes.description: Garrote lasts 6 sec longer.

nodes.name: Bloody Mess
nodes.description: Garrote and Rupture damage increased by 15%.

nodes.name: Deathmark
nodes.description:
Carve a deathmark into an enemy, dealing 125 Bleed damage and restoring 80 Energy to you over 16 sec. Damage dealt to the target by your Garrote, Rupture, and Lethal Poisons is increased by 100%.

Each time you apply a Lethal Poison to the target, apply it twice.

nodes.name: Caustic Spatter
nodes.description:
Envenom or Kingsbane apply Caustic Spatter for 10 sec. Limit 1.

Caustic Spatter causes 20% of your Nature damage dealt to splash onto other nearby enemies, reduced beyond 5 targets.

nodes.name: Sanguine Stratagem
nodes.description:
Gain 1 additional max combo point.

Your finishing moves that consume more than 5 combo points have increased effects, and your finishing moves deal 5% increased damage.

choices.name: Intent to Kill
choices.description: Shadowstep's cooldown is reduced by 33% when used on a target afflicted by your Garrote.

choices.name: Iron Wire
choices.description:
Garrote silences the target for 5 sec when used from Stealth.

Enemies silenced by Garrote deal 15% reduced damage for 5 sec.

nodes.name: Fatal Concoction
nodes.description: Increases the damage of your weapon poisons by 20%.

choices.name: Finish the Job
choices.description: All damage you deal is increased by 10% while Deathmark is active.

choices.name: Negotiable Contract
choices.description: If the target of your Deathmark dies, Deathmark jumps to a nearby enemy combatant for its remaining duration.

nodes.name: Lethal Dose
nodes.description: Your weapon poisons and Nature or Bleed damage over time abilities deal 1% increased damage to targets for each of your lethal poison or damage over time effects on them.

choices.name: Flying Daggers
choices.description: Fan of Knives has its radius increased to 12 yds, deals 20% more damage, and an additional 10% when striking 5 or more targets.

choices.name: Secondary Poisoning
choices.description: When you apply a Weapon Poison with a single-target attack, you have a 50% chance to strike a nearby enemy for 5 Physical damage and apply the same Weapon Poison to them.

nodes.name: Poison Bomb
nodes.description: Envenom has a 5% chance per combo point spent to smash a vial of poison at the target's location, creating a pool of acidic death that deals 55 Nature damage over 2 sec to all enemies within it.

nodes.name: Systemic Failure
nodes.description: Garrote increases the damage of Ambush and Mutilate on the target by 30%.

nodes.name: Venomous Wounds
nodes.description:
You regain 3 Energy each time your Garrote or Rupture deal Bleed damage to a target affected by your weapon poisons. Energy gain is reduced for bleeds beyond the first.

If an enemy dies while afflicted by your Rupture, you regain energy based on its remaining duration.

nodes.name: Amplifying Poison
nodes.description: Coats your weapons with a Lethal Poison that lasts for 1 hour. Each strike has a 30% chance to poison the enemy, dealing 2 Nature damage and applying Amplifying Poison for 12 sec. Envenom can consume 10 stacks of Amplifying Poison to deal 35% increased damage. Max 20 stacks.

nodes.name: Blindside
nodes.description: Ambush and Mutilate have a 15% chance to make your next Ambush free and usable without Stealth. Chance increased to 30% if the target is under 35% health.

nodes.name: Kingsbane
nodes.description:
Release a powerful poison from your weapons and inject it into your target, dealing 60 Nature damage instantly and an additional 71 Nature damage over 14 sec. 

Each time you apply a Lethal Poison to a target affected by Kingsbane, Kingsbane damage increases by 20%, up to 1,000%.

Awards 1 combo point.

nodes.name: Rapid Injection
nodes.description: Envenom's effect increases the damage of Envenom by 15%.

nodes.name: Shrouded Suffocation
nodes.description: Garrote damage increased by 20%. Garrote generates 2 additional combo points when used from Stealth.

nodes.name: Avulsion
nodes.description: Rupture damage increased by 20%.

nodes.name: Zoldyck Recipe
nodes.description: Your Bleed, weapon poison, and other Nature damage is increased by 15% against targets below 35% health.

nodes.name: Regicide's Reward
nodes.description: When Kingsbane ends, gain 2% haste for every 5 stacks of increased Kingsbane damage that you had, decreasing by 2% every 2 sec.

choices.name: Inspiring Strike
choices.description: Applying Envenom while Envenom is already active causes it to increase all damage you deal by 5% in addition to increasing your poison application chance.

choices.name: Poisoner's Drive
choices.description: Applying Envenom while Envenom is already active restores 1 combo point.

nodes.name: Deadly Momentum
nodes.description: Finishing moves have a 3% chance per combo point spent to increase your chance to critically strike by 6% for 6 sec.

nodes.name: Scent of Blood
nodes.description: Each enemy afflicted by your Rupture increases your Agility by 2%, up to a maximum of 20%.

nodes.name: Dashing Scoundrel
nodes.description: Envenom's effect also increases the critical strike chance of your weapon poisons by 5%, and their critical strikes generate 1 Energy.

nodes.name: Dragon-Tempered Blades
nodes.description: You may apply 1 additional Lethal and Non-Lethal Poison to your weapons, but they have 30% less application chance.

nodes.name: Sudden Demise
nodes.description:
Bleed damage increased by 10%.

Targets below 35% health instantly bleed out and take fatal damage when the remaining Bleed damage you would deal to them exceeds 150% of their remaining health.

ranks.description:
Nothing will save your target from you. Envenom damage increased by 10%. When your Envenom bonus expires, gain 20% increased Energy generation for 5 sec. 

Gain an additional 15% increased Energy generation for each Envenom you used while Envenom's bonus was active, up to 80% total.
Your Nature and Bleed ability damage is increased by 10%.
After striking with Kingsbane, rapidly strike that target 5 times over 1 sec for 91 Physical and 62 Nature damage. Each strike applies the Lethal Poisons on your weapons and generates a combo point.

nodes.name: Deal Fate
nodes.description: Mutilate, Ambush, and Fan of Knives generate 1 additional combo point when they trigger Seal Fate.

choices.name: Overflowing Purse
choices.description: Envenom has a 15% chance to flip 3 Fatebound Coins.

choices.name: Destiny Defined
choices.description: Sinister Strike has 5% increased chance to strike an additional time and grant Opportunity and your Fatebound Coins flipped have an additional 5% chance to match the same face as the last flip.

nodes.name: Delivered Doom
nodes.description: Envenom deals 5% more damage when it consumes 5 or more combo points.

nodes.name: Edge Case
nodes.description: Activating Deathmark flips a Fatebound Coin and causes it to land on its edge, counting as both Heads and Tails.

nodes.name: Mean Streak
nodes.description: Fatebound Coins flipped by Envenom are 33% more likely to match the same face as the last flip.

nodes.name: Hand of Fate
nodes.description:
Flip a Fatebound Coin each time a finishing move consumes 5 or more combo points. Heads increases the damage of your attacks by 10%, lasting 15 sec or until you flip Tails. Tails deals 58 Cosmic damage to your target.

For each time the same face is flipped in a row, Heads increases damage by an additional 2% and Tails increases its damage by 10%.

nodes.name: Lucky Coin
nodes.description:
Every 7 coin flips, keep a lucky coin that bends you towards your fate for 12 sec. Your Agility is increased by 4%, the damage and bonuses of Fatebound Coins are increased by 50%, and coin flips are 15% more likely to match the same face as the last flip.

Coin flips do not count toward finding a lucky coin while you have a lucky coin.

nodes.name: Rush to the Inevitable
nodes.description: Gain 5 Energy every time you flip a Fatebound Coin. Gain 15 Energy for Coins that land on their edge.

choices.name: Inexorable March
choices.description: You cannot be slowed below 70% of normal movement speed while your Fatebound Coin flips have an active streak of at least 2 flips matching the same face.

choices.name: Death's Arrival
choices.description: Grappling Hook may be used a second time within 3 sec with no cooldown, but its total cooldown is increased by 5 sec.

choices.name: Chosen's Revelry
choices.description: Flipping a Fatebound Coin restores 10 health.

choices.name: Tempted Fate
choices.description: You have a 30% chance to absorb 10% of any damage taken.

nodes.name: Fate Intertwined
nodes.description: Caustic Spatter causes an additional 5% of Nature damage dealt to be dealt to affected enemies.

nodes.name: Ravenholdt Mint
nodes.description: Flipping Heads increases damage by an additional 4%. Damage dealt by flipping Tails is increased by 12%.

nodes.name: Sometimes Lucky
nodes.description: Critical strike chance increased by 3%.

nodes.name: Controlled Chaos
nodes.description: After flipping a Fatebound Coin that ends a streak of 4 or more, flip another that matches the same face.

choices.name: Ethereal Cloak
choices.description: Cloak of Shadows duration increased by 2 sec.

choices.name: Bait and Switch
choices.description:
Evasion reduces magical damage taken by 15%. 

Cloak of Shadows reduces physical damage taken by 20%.

nodes.name: Corrupt the Blood
nodes.description: Rupture damage increased by 20%.

choices.name: Lingering Darkness
choices.description: After Deathmark expires, gain 30% increased Nature damage for 30 sec.

choices.name: Symbolic Victory
choices.description: Shadow Dance additionally increases the damage of your next Eviscerate or Black Powder by 15%.

nodes.name: Clear the Witnesses
nodes.description: Fan of Knives damage increased by 60%.

nodes.name: Singular Focus
nodes.description: Damage dealt to targets other than your Marked target deals 5% Plague damage to your Marked target.

choices.name: Shadewalker
choices.description: Each time you consume a stack of Deathstalker's Mark, reduce the cooldown of Shadowstep by 3 sec.

choices.name: Shroud of Night
choices.description: Shroud of Concealment duration increased by 5 sec.

choices.name: Momentum of Despair
choices.description: If you have critically struck with Fan of Knives, increase the critical strike chance of Fan of Knives and Crimson Tempest by 10% and critical strike damage by 20% for 8 sec.

choices.name: Follow the Blood
choices.description: Fan of Knives and Crimson Tempest deal 30% additional damage while 2 or more enemies are afflicted with Rupture.

nodes.name: Hunt Them Down
nodes.description: Auto-attacks against Marked targets deal an additional 3 Plague damage.

nodes.name: Unshakeable Drive
nodes.description: When you consume an application of Deathstalker's Mark, the damage of your next Ambush or Mutilate is increased by 50%.

nodes.name: Deathstalker's Mark
nodes.description:
Garrote applies 3 stacks of Deathstalker's Mark to your target, unless Deathstalker's Mark is already active. You learn Mark for Death.

When you spend 5 or more combo points on attacks against a Marked target you consume an application of Deathstalker's Mark, dealing 54 Plague damage.


Mark for Death
Move your active Deathstalker's Mark to your target.

nodes.name: Darkest Night
nodes.description:
When you consume the final Deathstalker's Mark from a target or your target dies, gain 30 Energy and Darkest Night, causing your next Envenom cast with 5 or more combo points to critically strike, deal 35% additional damage, and apply 3 stacks of Deathstalker's Mark to the target if no other Deathstalker's Mark is active.

Envenom cast with Darkest Night does not consume a stack of active Deathstalker's Marks.

nodes.name: Mass Casualty
nodes.description: Deathstalker's Mark deals 40% of its normal damage to all other enemies within 8 yds that are afflicted by Rupture.

nodes.name: Quietus Celeris
nodes.description: Deathstalker's Mark has a 30% chance to immediately consume a stack when applied.

nodes.name: Precise Killer
nodes.description: Critical strike damage bonus increased by 20%.

outlaw.description: A ruthless fugitive who uses agility and guile to stand toe-to-toe with enemies. Preferred Weapons: Axes, Maces, Swords, Fist Weapons

left.name: Trickster
left.description: Dirty tricks and flashing blades are on display when a Trickster enters a fight. Tricksters distract opponents with misdirection or a sword's flourish, then slash them with a blade they never saw coming.

right.name: Fatebound
right.description: The Fatebound eagerly act as the Hand of Fate, sowing chaos into well-laid plans. Guided by the whims of a flipped Fatebound Coin, they deliver the ending their enemies are destined for; the ending they deserve.

Attack with your off-hand, dealing 2 Physical damage, dispelling all enrage effects and applying a concentrated form of your active Non-Lethal poison.

Awards 1 combo point.

nodes.description: Movement speed increased by 15%.

Awards 1 combo point.

nodes.description: Sprint increases movement speed by an additional 30% and has 4 sec increased duration.

nodes.description: Increases the critical strike chance of your attacks that generate combo points by 5%.

choices.description: Ambush generates 1 additional combo point.

nodes.description: Increases your maximum Energy by 50 and Energy regeneration by 5%.

nodes.description:

Damaging finishing moves consume a supercharged combo point to function as if they spent 2 additional combo points.

Combat benefits requiring Stealth persist for an additional 3 sec after Stealth breaks.

nodes.name: Thistle Tea
nodes.description:
Restore 100 Energy.

When your Energy is reduced below 30, drink a Thistle Tea.

nodes.name: Cold Blooded Killer
nodes.description: Critically striking with an attack that generates combo points increases the critical strike chance of your next finishing move by 10%.

choices.name: Echoing Reprimand
choices.description: After consuming a supercharged combo point, your next Mutilate also strikes the target with an Echoing Reprimand dealing 41 Physical damage.

choices.name: Forced Induction
choices.description: Increase the bonus granted when a damaging finishing move consumes a supercharged combo point by 1.

nodes.name: Deeper Stratagem
nodes.description:
Gain 1 additional max combo point.

Your finishing moves that consume more than 5 combo points have increased effects, and your finishing moves deal 5% increased damage.

nodes.name: Without a Trace
nodes.description: Vanish has 1 additional charge.

nodes.name: Opportunity
nodes.description:
Sinister Strike has a 30% chance to hit an additional time and grant Opportunity.

 Opportunity
Your next Pistol Shot costs 50% less Energy and deals 100% increased damage.

choices.name: Hit and Run
choices.description: Movement speed increased by 15%.

choices.name: Combat Stamina
choices.description: Stamina increased by 5%.

nodes.name: Adrenaline Rush
nodes.description: Increases your Energy regeneration rate by 75%, your maximum Energy by 50, and your attack speed by 20% for 15 sec.

choices.name: Retractable Hook
choices.description: Reduces the cooldown of Grappling Hook by 15 sec.

choices.name: Blinding Powder
choices.description: Reduces the cooldown of Blind by 25% and increases its range by 5 yds.

nodes.name: Expert Duelist
nodes.description: Between the Eyes increases your damage dealt by an additional 2%.

nodes.name: Combat Potency
nodes.description: Increases your Energy regeneration rate by 16%.

nodes.name: Deadly Pursuit
nodes.description: After spending 15 combo points, if you spend no combo points for 4 sec, abilities affected by Restless Blades will cool down 200% faster for 5 sec or until you spend a combo point.

nodes.name: Precision Shot
nodes.description: Between the Eyes and Pistol Shot have 10 yd increased range and deal 20% increased damage.

nodes.name: Crescendo of Violence
nodes.description: Your finishing moves deal 10% increased damage.

nodes.name: Deft Maneuvers
nodes.description: Blade Flurry's initial damage is increased by 100% and generates 1 combo point per target struck, but its Energy cost is increased by 30.

nodes.name: Devious Stratagem
nodes.description:
Gain 1 additional max combo point.

Your finishing moves that consume more than 5 combo points have increased effects, and your finishing moves deal 5% increased damage.

nodes.name: Fatal Flourish
nodes.description: Your off-hand attacks and Pistol Shots have a 25% chance to generate 8 Energy.

nodes.name: Quick Draw
nodes.description: Opportunity increases the damage of Pistol Shot by an additional 20%. Each charge of Opportunity consumed by Pistol Shot generates 1 combo point.

nodes.name: Ruthlessness
nodes.description: Your finishing moves have a 20% chance per combo point spent to grant a combo point.

nodes.name: Blade Rush
nodes.description:
Charge to your target with your blades out, dealing 298 Physical damage to the target and 129 to all other nearby enemies. Damage reduced beyond 8 targets.

While Blade Flurry is active, damage to non-primary targets is increased by 100%.

Generates 25 Energy over 5 sec.

nodes.name: Loaded Dice
nodes.description: Activating Adrenaline Rush improves the result of your next Roll the Bones by one level.

nodes.name: Sleight of Hand
nodes.description: Roll the Bones has a 20% increased chance of granting more powerful results.

nodes.name: Improved Between the Eyes
nodes.description: Critical strikes with Between the Eyes deal 3.0 times normal damage.

choices.name: Thief's Versatility
choices.description: Versatility increased by 3%.

choices.name: Flickering Steel
choices.description: Sinister Strike and Ambush deal 20% increased damage. They also generate 5 Energy when they grant you Opportunity.

nodes.name: Audacity
nodes.description:
Using Pistol Shot with Opportunity has a 30% chance to make your next Ambush usable without Stealth.

Chance to trigger this effect matches the chance for Sinister Strike to grant Opportunity.

nodes.name: Heavy Hitter
nodes.description: Attacks that generate combo points deal 10% increased damage.

nodes.name: Improved Adrenaline Rush
nodes.description: Generate full combo points when you gain Adrenaline Rush.

nodes.name: Ace Up Your Sleeve
nodes.description: Between the Eyes has a 3% chance per combo point spent to grant 4 combo points and reset its own cooldown.

nodes.name: Dancing Steel
nodes.description: Blade Flurry strikes 3 additional enemies and its duration is increased by 3 sec.

nodes.name: Find an Opening
nodes.description: Your chance for Sinister Strike to strike twice and grant Opportunity is increased by 10%

nodes.name: Acrobatic Strikes
nodes.description: Auto-attacks increase auto-attack damage by 3% and movement speed by 1% for 3 sec, stacking up to 10 times.

choices.name: Heightened Rush
choices.description: Adrenaline Rush's duration is increased by 4 sec.

choices.name: Menacing Rush
choices.description: Adrenaline Rush magnifies your precision and power, increasing the damage your combo point generating abilities and finishers deal by 20%.

nodes.name: Zero In
nodes.description: Your auto-attack critical strikes increase the damage and critical strike chance of your next Between the Eyes by 3%, stacking up to 20 times.

nodes.name: Grand Melee
nodes.description: Blade Flurry causes your attacks to hit nearby enemies for an additional 8% of their normal damage.

nodes.name: Summarily Dispatched
nodes.description: Dispatch deals 10% increased damage and costs 3 less Energy. This damage bonus is increased by 50% while your damage is enhanced by your Between the Eyes.

nodes.name: Dragon-Bone Dice
nodes.description:
The bonuses granted by your Roll the Bones are stronger.

Bonuses to chance for Sinister Strike to strike twice are 5% greater.
Bonuses to Sinister Strike and Ambush damage are 5% greater.
Bonuses to Restless Blades cooldown reduction are 10% greater.
Jackpot's bonus to critical strike chance is 5% greater.

nodes.name: Fan the Hammer
nodes.description:
When you gain Opportunity, gain 1 additional charge. Max 6 charges.

Pistol Shot consumes 1 additional charge of Opportunity to fire 1 additional bullet. Additional shots deal 20% reduced damage.

nodes.name: Hidden Opportunity
nodes.description: Ambush has a chance to grant Opportunity. Chance to trigger this effect is 80% of the chance for Sinister Strike to grant Opportunity.

nodes.name: Killing Spree
nodes.description:
Finishing move that unleashes a barrage of gunfire, striking random enemies within 8 yards for Physical damage. Number of strikes increased per combo point.

Restores 1 combo point every 0.45 sec.

   1 point  : 196 over 0.45 sec
   2 points: 294 over 0.89 sec
   3 points: 393 over 1.34 sec
   4 points: 491 over 1.78 sec
   5 points: 589 over 2.23 sec

nodes.name: Keep It Rolling
nodes.description: Increase the remaining duration of your active Roll the Bones combat enhancement by 30 sec.

nodes.name: Fast Action
nodes.description: The cooldown of Between the Eyes is reduced by 5 sec.

nodes.name: Preparation
nodes.description: Immediately reset the cooldowns of Adrenaline Rush, Between the Eyes, Blade Flurry, Blade Rush, and Killing Spree.

ranks.description: Between the Eyes has a 45% chance to apply 2 stacks of its bonus to your damage dealt.
When you spend 5 or more combo points on Dispatch, immediately strike your target with an underhanded Scoundrel Strike for 53 Physical damage.

When you Dispatch you have a 12% chance per combo point spent to hide a bullet up your sleeve. When you've hidden 6 bullets, your next Between the Eyes consumes them and costs no Energy, generates 6 combo points, and immediately resets its own cooldown.

nodes.name: Flawless Form
nodes.description: Unseen Blade and Secret Technique increase the damage of your finishing moves by 4% for 12 sec. Max 5 stacks.

nodes.name: Coup de Grace
nodes.description: After 4 strikes with Unseen Blade, your next Eviscerate will be performed as a Coup de Grace, functioning as if it had consumed 5 additional combo points, and granting you 5 stacks of Flawless Form.

choices.name: Cloud Cover
choices.description:
Activating Shadow Blades creates a cloud of smoke for 6 sec, allowing attacks from within the cloud to apply Fazed, stacking up to 2 additional times.

Effect persists for 6 sec after leaving the cloud.

choices.name: No Scruples
choices.description: Finishing moves have 12% increased chance to critically strike Fazed targets.

nodes.name: Disorienting Strikes
nodes.description: Secret Technique has 10% reduced cooldown and allows your next 2 strikes of Unseen Blade to ignore its cooldown.

nodes.name: Surprising Strikes
nodes.description: Attacks that generate combo points deal 50% increased critical strike damage to Fazed targets.

nodes.name: Nimble Flurry
nodes.description: Your auto-attacks, Unseen Blade, and Coup de Grace also strike up to 7 nearby enemies for 50% of normal damage while Flawless Form is active.

nodes.name: Devious Distractions
nodes.description: Secret Technique applies Fazed to any targets struck.

choices.name: So Tricky
choices.description: Tricks of the Trade's threat redirect duration is increased to 1 hour.

choices.name: Don't Be Suspicious
choices.description:
Blind and Shroud of Concealment have 10% reduced cooldown.

Pick Pocket and Sap have 10 yd increased range.

choices.name: Thousand Cuts
choices.description: Slice and Dice grants 10% additional attack speed and gives your auto-attacks a chance to refresh your opportunity to strike with Unseen Blade.

choices.name: Flickerstrike
choices.description:
Taking damage from an area-of-effect attack while Feint is active or dodging while Evasion is active refreshes your opportunity to strike with Unseen Blade.

This effect may only occur once every 5 sec.

nodes.name: Unseen Blade
nodes.description:
Backstab and Shadowstrike now also strike with an Unseen Blade dealing 100 damage. Targets struck are Fazed for 10 sec.

Fazed enemies take 5% more damage from you and cannot parry your attacks.

This effect may occur once every 20 sec.

choices.name: Smoke
choices.description: You take 5% reduced damage from Fazed targets.

choices.name: Mirrors
choices.description: Feint reduces damage taken from area-of-effect attacks by an additional 10%

nodes.name: Clever Combatant
nodes.description: Shuriken Storm has 10% increased critical strike chance and now triggers Unseen Blade when available.

nodes.name: Flashing Steel
nodes.description: Unseen Blade may now occur once every 15 sec and has 25% chance to strike twice.

nodes.name: Hoodwink
nodes.description: Fazed increases damage taken by an additional 3%.

nodes.name: Deal Fate
nodes.description: Mutilate, Ambush, and Fan of Knives generate 1 additional combo point when they trigger Seal Fate.

choices.name: Overflowing Purse
choices.description: Envenom has a 15% chance to flip 3 Fatebound Coins.

choices.name: Destiny Defined
choices.description: Sinister Strike has 5% increased chance to strike an additional time and grant Opportunity and your Fatebound Coins flipped have an additional 5% chance to match the same face as the last flip.

nodes.name: Delivered Doom
nodes.description: Envenom deals 5% more damage when it consumes 5 or more combo points.

nodes.name: Edge Case
nodes.description: Activating Deathmark flips a Fatebound Coin and causes it to land on its edge, counting as both Heads and Tails.

nodes.name: Mean Streak
nodes.description: Fatebound Coins flipped by Envenom are 33% more likely to match the same face as the last flip.

nodes.name: Hand of Fate
nodes.description:
Flip a Fatebound Coin each time a finishing move consumes 5 or more combo points. Heads increases the damage of your attacks by 10%, lasting 15 sec or until you flip Tails. Tails deals 57 Cosmic damage to your target.

For each time the same face is flipped in a row, Heads increases damage by an additional 2% and Tails increases its damage by 10%.

nodes.name: Lucky Coin
nodes.description:
Every 7 coin flips, keep a lucky coin that bends you towards your fate for 12 sec. Your Agility is increased by 4%, the damage and bonuses of Fatebound Coins are increased by 50%, and coin flips are 15% more likely to match the same face as the last flip.

Coin flips do not count toward finding a lucky coin while you have a lucky coin.

nodes.name: Rush to the Inevitable
nodes.description: Gain 5 Energy every time you flip a Fatebound Coin. Gain 15 Energy for Coins that land on their edge.

choices.name: Inexorable March
choices.description: You cannot be slowed below 70% of normal movement speed while your Fatebound Coin flips have an active streak of at least 2 flips matching the same face.

choices.name: Death's Arrival
choices.description: Grappling Hook may be used a second time within 3 sec with no cooldown, but its total cooldown is increased by 5 sec.

choices.name: Chosen's Revelry
choices.description: Flipping a Fatebound Coin restores 10 health.

choices.name: Tempted Fate
choices.description: You have a 30% chance to absorb 10% of any damage taken.

nodes.name: Fate Intertwined
nodes.description: Caustic Spatter causes an additional 5% of Nature damage dealt to be dealt to affected enemies.

nodes.name: Ravenholdt Mint
nodes.description: Flipping Heads increases damage by an additional 4%. Damage dealt by flipping Tails is increased by 12%.

nodes.name: Sometimes Lucky
nodes.description: Critical strike chance increased by 3%.

nodes.name: Controlled Chaos
nodes.description: After flipping a Fatebound Coin that ends a streak of 4 or more, flip another that matches the same face.

subtlety.description: A dark stalker who leaps from the shadows to ambush their unsuspecting prey. Preferred Weapons: Daggers

left.name: Trickster
left.description: Dirty tricks and flashing blades are on display when a Trickster enters a fight. Tricksters distract opponents with misdirection or a sword's flourish, then slash them with a blade they never saw coming.

right.name: Deathstalker
right.description: The harbingers of death, Deathstalkers strike from the shadows to bring a swift end to their targets.

nodes.name: Shiv
nodes.description:
Attack with your off-hand, dealing 2 Physical damage, dispelling all enrage effects and applying a concentrated form of your active Non-Lethal poison.

Awards 1 combo point.

nodes.name: Blind
nodes.description: Blinds the target, causing it to wander disoriented for 1 min. Damage may interrupt the effect. Limit 1.

nodes.name: Cloak of Shadows
nodes.description: Provides a moment of magic immunity, instantly removing all harmful spell effects. The cloak lingers, causing you to resist harmful spells for 5 sec.

nodes.name: Toxic Stiletto
nodes.description: Shiv's Energy cost is reduced by 20, its cooldown is reduced by 15 sec, and its range is increased by 3 yds.

nodes.name: Fleet Footed
nodes.description: Movement speed increased by 15%.

choices.name: Gouge
choices.description:
Gouges the eyes of an enemy target, incapacitating for 4 sec. Damage may interrupt the effect.

Must be in front of your target.

Awards 1 combo point.

choices.name: Airborne Irritant
choices.description: Blind has 50% reduced cooldown, 70% reduced duration, and applies to all nearby enemies.

nodes.name: Thrill Seeking
nodes.description: Shadowstep has 1 additional charge.

nodes.name: Shadowrunner
nodes.description: While Stealth or Shadow Dance is active, you move 20% faster.

nodes.name: Master Poisoner
nodes.description: Increases the non-damaging effects of your weapon poisons by 20%.

choices.name: Elusiveness
choices.description: Evasion also reduces damage taken by 20%, and Feint also reduces non-area-of-effect damage taken by 20%.

choices.name: Cheat Death
choices.description: Fatal attacks instead reduce you to 7% of your maximum health. For 3 sec afterward, you take 85% reduced damage. Cannot trigger more often than once per 6 min.

choices.name: Tricks of the Trade
choices.description: Redirects all threat you cause to the targeted party or raid member, beginning with your next damaging attack within the next 30 sec and lasting 6 sec.

choices.name: Blackjack
choices.description: Enemies have 30% reduced damage and healing for 6 sec after Blind or Sap's effect on them ends.

nodes.name: Improved Wound Poison
nodes.description: Wound Poison can now stack 2 additional times.

nodes.name: Nimble Fingers
nodes.description: Energy cost of Feint and Crimson Vial reduced by 10.

nodes.name: Deadened Nerves
nodes.description: Physical damage taken reduced by 5%.

nodes.name: Quick Fingers
nodes.description: Increases your Agility by 3%.

nodes.name: Improved Sprint
nodes.description: Reduces the cooldown of Sprint by 60 sec.

nodes.name: Superior Mixture
nodes.description: Crippling Poison reduces movement speed by an additional 10%.

nodes.name: Evasion
nodes.description: Increases your dodge chance by 100% for 10 sec.

nodes.name: Iron Stomach
nodes.description: Increases the healing you receive from Crimson Vial, healing potions, and healthstones by 25%.

nodes.name: Virulent Poisons
nodes.description: Increases the damage of your weapon poisons by 10%.

nodes.name: Stillshroud
nodes.description: Shroud of Concealment has 50% reduced cooldown.

nodes.name: Graceful Guile
nodes.description: Feint has 1 additional charge.

nodes.name: Featherfoot
nodes.description: Sprint increases movement speed by an additional 30% and has 4 sec increased duration.

choices.name: Numbing Poison
choices.description: Coats your weapons with a Non-Lethal Poison that lasts for 1 hour. Each strike has a 30% chance of poisoning the enemy, clouding their mind and slowing their attack and casting speed by 15% for 10 sec.

choices.name: Atrophic Poison
choices.description: Coats your weapons with a Non-Lethal Poison that lasts for 1 hour. Each strike has a 30% chance of poisoning the enemy, reducing their damage by 3.0% for 10 sec.

nodes.name: Deadly Precision
nodes.description: Increases the critical strike chance of your attacks that generate combo points by 5%.

nodes.name: Sanguine Vial
nodes.description: When you deal the killing blow to a target that yields experience or honor, the cooldown of Crimson Vial is reduced by 15 sec and your next use heals 5% of your health instantly.

nodes.name: Deep Cuts
nodes.description: Your finishing moves deal 6% increased damage.

nodes.name: Unbreakable Stride
nodes.description: Reduces the duration of movement slowing effects 30%.

nodes.name: Danger Sense
nodes.description: You have a 20% chance to partially evade any damage dealt to you, reducing the damage it deals by 20%.

nodes.name: Swift Slasher
nodes.description: Slice and Dice grants additional attack speed equal to 100% of your Haste.

choices.name: Improved Ambush
choices.description: Ambush generates 1 additional combo point.

choices.name: Tight Spender
choices.description: Energy cost of finishing moves reduced by 6%.

nodes.name: Leeching Poison
nodes.description: Adds a Leeching effect to your Lethal poisons, granting you 3.0% Leech.

nodes.name: Lethality
nodes.description: Critical strike chance increased by 1%. Critical strike damage bonus of your attacks that generate combo points increased by 10%.

nodes.name: Recuperator
nodes.description: Slice and Dice heals you for up to 1% of your maximum health per 3 sec.

nodes.name: Alacrity
nodes.description: Haste increased by 1.5%.

nodes.name: Soothing Darkness
nodes.description: You are healed for 30% of your maximum health over 6 sec after activating Vanish.

nodes.name: Vigor
nodes.description: Increases your maximum Energy by 50 and Energy regeneration by 5%.

nodes.name: Supercharger
nodes.description:
Kingsbane supercharges 1 combo point.

Damaging finishing moves consume a supercharged combo point to function as if they spent 2 additional combo points.

nodes.name: Subterfuge
nodes.description:
Abilities requiring Stealth can be used for 3 sec after Stealth breaks.

Combat benefits requiring Stealth persist for an additional 3 sec after Stealth breaks.

nodes.name: Thistle Tea
nodes.description:
Restore 100 Energy.

When your Energy is reduced below 30, drink a Thistle Tea.

nodes.name: Cold Blooded Killer
nodes.description: Critically striking with an attack that generates combo points increases the critical strike chance of your next finishing move by 10%.

choices.name: Echoing Reprimand
choices.description: After consuming a supercharged combo point, your next Mutilate also strikes the target with an Echoing Reprimand dealing 41 Physical damage.

choices.name: Forced Induction
choices.description: Increase the bonus granted when a damaging finishing move consumes a supercharged combo point by 1.

nodes.name: Deeper Stratagem
nodes.description:
Gain 1 additional max combo point.

Your finishing moves that consume more than 5 combo points have increased effects, and your finishing moves deal 5% increased damage.

nodes.name: Without a Trace
nodes.description: Vanish has 1 additional charge.

nodes.name: Find Weakness
nodes.description: Your Stealth abilities allow you to see the flaws in enemies' defenses, causing your attacks to ignore 30% armor for 10 sec.

nodes.name: Improved Backstab
nodes.description:
Backstab has 15% increased critical strike chance.

While behind your target, Backstab critical strikes grant Find Weakness for 10 sec.

nodes.name: Shadow Blades
nodes.description: Draws upon surrounding shadows to empower your weapons, causing your attacks to deal 20% additional damage as Shadow and causing your combo point generating abilities to generate double combo points for 16 sec.

nodes.name: Improved Shuriken Storm
nodes.description:
Shuriken Storm has 15% increased critical strike chance.

Shuriken Storm critical strikes grant Find Weakness for 10 sec.

nodes.name: Premeditation
nodes.description: After entering Stealth, your next combo point generating ability generates full combo points.

choices.name: Quick Decisions
choices.description: Shadowstep's cooldown is reduced by 20%, and its maximum range is increased by 20%.

choices.name: Ephemeral Bond
choices.description: Increases healing received by 8%.

nodes.name: Silent Storm
nodes.description: Gaining Stealth, Vanish, or Shadow Dance causes your next Shuriken Storm to have 100% increased chance to critically strike.

nodes.name: Shrouded in Darkness
nodes.description: Shroud of Concealment increases the movement speed of allies by 100% and leaving its area no longer cancels the effect.

choices.name: Shot in the Dark
choices.description: After using Vanish or Shadow Dance, your next Cheap Shot is free and ignores its cooldown.

choices.name: Exhilarating Execution
choices.description: Your finishing moves heal you for 5% of damage done. At full health gain shielding instead, absorbing up to 10% of your maximum health.

choices.name: Cloaked in Shadows
choices.description: Vanish grants you a shield for 6 sec, absorbing damage equal to 18% of your maximum health.

choices.name: Fade to Nothing
choices.description: Movement speed increased by 20% and damage taken reduced by 10% for 8 sec after gaining Stealth, Vanish, or Shadow Dance.

choices.name: Night Terrors
choices.description: Shuriken Storm reduces enemies' movement speed by 50% for 8 sec.

choices.name: Terrifying Pace
choices.description: Shuriken Storm increases your movement speed by 30% for 3 sec when striking 3 or more enemies.

nodes.name: Master of Shadows
nodes.description: Gain 30 Energy over 3 sec when you enter Stealth or activate Shadow Dance.

nodes.name: Gloomblade
nodes.description:
Punctures your target with your shadow-infused blade for 43 Shadow damage, bypassing armor.

Awards 1 combo point.

nodes.name: Shadow Focus
nodes.description: Abilities deal 10% more damage while Stealth or Shadow Dance is active.

nodes.name: Improved Secret Technique
nodes.description: Secret Technique damage increased by 15%.

nodes.name: Relentless Strikes
nodes.description: Your finishing moves generate 5 Energy per combo point spent.

nodes.name: Weaponmaster
nodes.description: Backstab and Shadowstrike have a 15% chance to create a Shadow Clone that repeats the attack for 50% of normal damage as Shadow.

choices.name: Planned Execution
choices.description: Shadow Dance increases the critical strike damage bonus of your abilities by 10%.

choices.name: Warning Signs
choices.description: Shadow Dance increases attack speed by 25%.

nodes.name: Double Dance
nodes.description: Shadow Dance has 1 additional charge.

nodes.name: Shadowed Finishers
nodes.description: Eviscerate and Black Powder deal an additional 30% damage as Shadow while Find Weakness is active.

nodes.name: Secret Stratagem
nodes.description:
Gain 1 additional max combo point.

Your finishing moves that consume more than 5 combo points have increased effects, and your finishing moves deal 5% increased damage.

nodes.name: Shuriken Tornado
nodes.description: Shuriken Storm has a 15% chance to create a Shadow Clone that repeats the attack for 50% of normal damage as Shadow.

nodes.name: Umbral Edge
nodes.description:
Shadow Clones deal 15% increased damage.

Cheap Shot creates a Shadow Clone to Shadowstrike the target for 50% of normal damage as Shadow.

Kidney Shot creates a Shadow Clone to Eviscerate the target for 50% of normal damage as Shadow.

nodes.name: The First Dance
nodes.description: Remaining out of combat for 6 sec increases the duration of your next Shadow Dance by 3 sec.

nodes.name: Deepening Shadows
nodes.description:
Shadow Dance duration is increased by 150% of your Haste stat.

Current bonus duration: 0.00 sec

nodes.name: Veiltouched
nodes.description: Your abilities deal 5% increased magic damage.

nodes.name: Replicating Shadows
nodes.description: Shadow Clones deal 15% increased damage and your effects that have a chance to create them have 5% additional chance to occur.

nodes.name: Improved Find Weakness
nodes.description: Find Weakness causes your attacks to ignore an additional 20% armor.

nodes.name: Perforated Veins
nodes.description: Backstab, Shuriken Storm, and Shadowstrike have 10% increased damage while Find Weakness is active.

nodes.name: Lingering Shadow
nodes.description: After Shadow Dance ends, Backstab deals an additional 50% damage as Shadow, fading by 2.8% per sec.

nodes.name: Deeper Daggers
nodes.description: Shadow damage increased by 8%.

nodes.name: Potent Powder
nodes.description: Black Powder deals increased damage equal to 20% of your Mastery when it spends 5 or more combo points.

nodes.name: Death Perception
nodes.description:
Find Weakness increases the damage of finishing moves by 5%.

Shadow Dance increases the damage of finishing moves by 5%.

Shadow Blades increases the damage of finishing moves by 5%.

nodes.name: Dark Shadow
nodes.description: Shadow Dance increases all ability damage by 5%, and Shadowstrike and Shuriken Storm damage by an additional 5%.

nodes.name: Finality
nodes.description: Eviscerate and Black Powder have 15% increased critical strike damage bonus.

nodes.name: The Rotten
nodes.description: After activating Shadow Dance, your next 2 attacks that generate combo points deal 35% increased damage.

nodes.name: Shadowcraft
nodes.description: While Shadow Dance is active, your Shadow Techniques triggers 40% more frequently, stores 1 additional combo point, and generates 2 additional Energy.

nodes.name: Danse Macabre
nodes.description: While Shadow Dance is active, each different attack that generates or spends combo points lashes out at the target, dealing 146 Shadow damage.

nodes.name: Goremaw's Bite
nodes.description:
Lashes out at the target, inflicting 114 Shadow damage and causing your next 3 finishing moves to cost no Energy.

Awards 3 combo points.

nodes.name: Dark Brew
nodes.description:
Your weapon poisons have 10% increased application chance and now deal damage as Shadow instead of Nature.

Shadow damage increased by 10%.

ranks.description: Damaging attacks that expend Shadow Techniques to generate combo points have a 15% chance per stack expended to create a Shadow Clone that repeats the attack for 50% of normal damage as Shadow.

Shadow damage increased by 5%.

Shadow Clones have a 50% chance to trigger Shadow Techniques' effect.
After attacks that generate combo points, if 5 or more stacks of Shadow Techniques remain, your next damaging finishing move will expend them to generate combo points up to your max.

nodes.name: Flawless Form
nodes.description: Unseen Blade and Secret Technique increase the damage of your finishing moves by 4% for 12 sec. Max 5 stacks.

nodes.name: Coup de Grace
nodes.description: After 4 strikes with Unseen Blade, your next Eviscerate will be performed as a Coup de Grace, functioning as if it had consumed 5 additional combo points, and granting you 5 stacks of Flawless Form.

choices.description:
Activating Shadow Blades creates a cloud of smoke for 6 sec, allowing attacks from within the cloud to apply Fazed, stacking up to 2 additional times.

Effect persists for 6 sec after leaving the cloud.

choices.description: Finishing moves have 12% increased chance to critically strike Fazed targets.

nodes.description: Secret Technique has 10% reduced cooldown and allows your next 2 strikes of Unseen Blade to ignore its cooldown.

nodes.description: Attacks that generate combo points deal 50% increased critical strike damage to Fazed targets.

nodes.name: Nimble Flurry
nodes.description: Your auto-attacks, Unseen Blade, and Coup de Grace also strike up to 7 nearby enemies for 50% of normal damage while Flawless Form is active.

nodes.name: Devious Distractions
nodes.description: Secret Technique applies Fazed to any targets struck.

choices.name: So Tricky
choices.description: Tricks of the Trade's threat redirect duration is increased to 1 hour.

choices.description:
Blind and Shroud of Concealment have 10% reduced cooldown.

Pick Pocket and Sap have 10 yd increased range.

choices.description: Slice and Dice grants 10% additional attack speed and gives your auto-attacks a chance to refresh your opportunity to strike with Unseen Blade.

choices.name: Flickerstrike
choices.description:
Taking damage from an area-of-effect attack while Feint is active or dodging while Evasion is active refreshes your opportunity to strike with Unseen Blade.

This effect may only occur once every 5 sec.

nodes.name: Unseen Blade
nodes.description:
Backstab and Shadowstrike now also strike with an Unseen Blade dealing 98 damage. Targets struck are Fazed for 10 sec.

Fazed enemies take 5% more damage from you and cannot parry your attacks.

This effect may occur once every 20 sec.

choices.name: Smoke
choices.description: You take 5% reduced damage from Fazed targets.

choices.name: Mirrors
choices.description: Feint reduces damage taken from area-of-effect attacks by an additional 10%

nodes.name: Clever Combatant
nodes.description: Shuriken Storm has 10% increased critical strike chance and now triggers Unseen Blade when available.

nodes.name: Flashing Steel
nodes.description: Unseen Blade may now occur once every 15 sec and has 25% chance to strike twice.

nodes.name: Hoodwink
nodes.description: Fazed increases damage taken by an additional 3%.

choices.name: Ethereal Cloak
choices.description: Cloak of Shadows duration increased by 2 sec.

choices.name: Bait and Switch
choices.description:
Evasion reduces magical damage taken by 15%. 

Cloak of Shadows reduces physical damage taken by 20%.

nodes.name: Corrupt the Blood
nodes.description: Rupture damage increased by 20%.

choices.name: Lingering Darkness
choices.description: After Deathmark expires, gain 30% increased Nature damage for 30 sec.

choices.name: Symbolic Victory
choices.description: Shadow Dance additionally increases the damage of your next Eviscerate or Black Powder by 15%.

nodes.name: Clear the Witnesses
nodes.description: Fan of Knives damage increased by 60%.

nodes.name: Singular Focus
nodes.description: Damage dealt to targets other than your Marked target deals 5% Plague damage to your Marked target.

choices.name: Shadewalker
choices.description: Each time you consume a stack of Deathstalker's Mark, reduce the cooldown of Shadowstep by 3 sec.

choices.name: Shroud of Night
choices.description: Shroud of Concealment duration increased by 5 sec.

choices.name: Momentum of Despair
choices.description: If you have critically struck with Fan of Knives, increase the critical strike chance of Fan of Knives and Crimson Tempest by 10% and critical strike damage by 20% for 8 sec.

choices.name: Follow the Blood
choices.description: Fan of Knives and Crimson Tempest deal 30% additional damage while 2 or more enemies are afflicted with Rupture.

nodes.name: Hunt Them Down
nodes.description: Auto-attacks against Marked targets deal an additional 3 Plague damage.

nodes.name: Unshakeable Drive
nodes.description: When you consume an application of Deathstalker's Mark, the damage of your next Ambush or Mutilate is increased by 50%.

nodes.name: Deathstalker's Mark
nodes.description:
Garrote applies 3 stacks of Deathstalker's Mark to your target, unless Deathstalker's Mark is already active. You learn Mark for Death.

When you spend 5 or more combo points on attacks against a Marked target you consume an application of Deathstalker's Mark, dealing 54 Plague damage.


Mark for Death
Move your active Deathstalker's Mark to your target.

nodes.name: Darkest Night
nodes.description:
When you consume the final Deathstalker's Mark from a target or your target dies, gain 30 Energy and Darkest Night, causing your next Envenom cast with 5 or more combo points to critically strike, deal 35% additional damage, and apply 3 stacks of Deathstalker's Mark to the target if no other Deathstalker's Mark is active.

Envenom cast with Darkest Night does not consume a stack of active Deathstalker's Marks.

nodes.name: Mass Casualty
nodes.description: Deathstalker's Mark deals 40% of its normal damage to all other enemies within 8 yds that are afflicted by Rupture.

nodes.name: Quietus Celeris
nodes.description: Deathstalker's Mark has a 30% chance to immediately consume a stack when applied.

nodes.name: Precise Killer
nodes.description: Critical strike damage bonus increased by 20%.
